operations.name: write_at_rotate
preconditions:

(declare-fun i () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert
        (bvult 
               (concat 
                       (select 
                               i
                               (_ bv7 32)
                       )
                       (concat 
                               (select 
                                       i
                                       (_ bv6 32)
                               )
                               (concat 
                                       (select 
                                               i
                                               (_ bv5 32)
                                       )
                                       (concat 
                                               (select 
                                                       i
                                                       (_ bv4 32)
                                               )
                                               (concat 
                                                       (select 
                                                               i
                                                               (_ bv3 32)
                                                       )
                                                       (concat 
                                                               (select 
                                                                       i
                                                                       (_ bv2 32)
                                                               )
                                                               (concat 
                                                                       (select 
                                                                               i
                                                                               (_ bv1 32)
                                                                       )
                                                                       (select 
                                                                               i
                                                                               (_ bv0 32)
                                                                       )
                                                               )
                                                       )
                                               )
                                       )
                               )
                       )
               )
               (_ bv4294967296 64)
        )
)
(check-sat)
(exit)

operations.name: write_at_kbmi_pre_routing_hook
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun filler_byte () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun sep_pos () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun shellcode_byte () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert
        (and 
             (and 
                  (bvult 
                         (concat 
                                 (select 
                                         sep_pos
                                         (_ bv7 32)
                                 )
                                 (concat 
                                         (select 
                                                 sep_pos
                                                 (_ bv6 32)
                                         )
                                         (concat 
                                                 (select 
                                                         sep_pos
                                                         (_ bv5 32)
                                                 )
                                                 (concat 
                                                         (select 
                                                                 sep_pos
                                                                 (_ bv4 32)
                                                         )
                                                         (concat 
                                                                 (select 
                                                                         sep_pos
                                                                         (_ bv3 32)
                                                                 )
                                                                 (concat 
                                                                         (select 
                                                                                 sep_pos
                                                                                 (_ bv2 32)
                                                                         )
                                                                         (concat 
                                                                                 (select 
                                                                                         sep_pos
                                                                                         (_ bv1 32)
                                                                                 )
                                                                                 (select 
                                                                                         sep_pos
                                                                                         (_ bv0 32)
                                                                                 )
                                                                         )
                                                                 )
                                                         )
                                                 )
                                         )
                                 )
                         )
                         (_ bv1023 64)
                  )
                  (= 
                     (_ bv144 8)
                     (select 
                             shellcode_byte
                             (_ bv0 32)
                     )
                  )
             )
             (= 
                false
                (= 
                   (_ bv0 8)
                   (select 
                           filler_byte
                           (_ bv0 32)
                   )
                )
             )
        )
)
(check-sat)
(exit)
